name: Suspicious Certutil Command Detected
description: Detection of suspicious `certutil.exe` execution with command-line arguments often used by adversaries for defense evasion and remote file download. This is a common technique to deobfuscate malicious code or download payloads without triggering standard security tools.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: the process **`certutil.exe`** was executed with a suspicious command line: **{command}**. This is a strong indicator of **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1140**) or **Remote File Download** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1105**) where an adversary is attempting to use a trusted Windows utility to deobfuscate code or download a payload. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious file. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed with certutil.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
